name: Ally of Justice Thousand Arms
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ａ・Ｏ・Ｊ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アーリー・オブ・ジャスティス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> サウザンド・アームズ
desc: This card can attack all face-up LIGHT monsters your opponent controls once each. If this card battles a non-LIGHT monster, destroy this card before damage calculation.
mnst_eff: This card can attack all face-up LIGHT monsters your opponent controls once each. If this card battles a non-LIGHT monster, destroy this card before damage calculation.
eff: This card can attack all face-up LIGHT monsters your opponent controls once each. If this card battles a non-LIGHT monster, destroy this card before damage calculation.

mst: Destroys battling monster before damage calculation
attack: Can make multiple attacks on monsters
